overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic spaceport entrance called New Atlantis. The scene features a massive geometric glass dome structure overhead, a UC Security checkpoint, and sleek sci-fi architecture with various NPCs populating the plaza.

events.description: exits narrow entrance channel into the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the entrance corridor toward the main plaza

entered.detail: tall barrier wall with orange and white diagonal stripes lining the left side of the entrance ramp
matching barrier wall on the right side of the entrance channel
massive geometric glass and steel dome roof structure covering the plaza ahead
large signage reading NEW ATLANTIS on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow entrance corridor with orange and white striped walls on both sides. The camera walks forward toward a massive glass dome structure visible in the distance, with the New Atlantis sign prominent on the left building. The space transitions from enclosed channel to open plaza around the 12-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: main arrival plaza under glass dome

events.description: camera pans upward to look at the glass dome ceiling structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the plaza while looking around at the architecture and upward at the dome

notable_agents.action: small yellow cleaning robot moving across the plaza floor

entered.detail: large dark structure with UC Security signage and colorful geometric patterns on the facade
circular security booth with orange and white stripes in the center of the plaza
teal directional signage indicating arrivals and proceed to security
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible through the glass dome in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide open plaza beneath the massive glass dome. A small cleaning robot moves across the tiled floor. The UC Security building dominates the right side while futuristic city spires are visible through the dome. Around 25 seconds, the camera pans upward to admire the geometric glass ceiling structure.

events.description: approaching and circling the security checkpoint booth

agents.ego_description: walking toward the security checkpoint and circling around the booth

notable_agents.action: security guard standing at the checkpoint booth entrance

entered.detail: overhead teal sign indicating direction to hotel and shopping areas
overhead signage for NAT New Atlantis Transit

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the circular UC Security checkpoint booth in the plaza center. A security guard stands near the entrance. Overhead signs for Hotel & Shopping and NAT become visible. The camera circles the checkpoint booth, revealing more of the plaza layout and the futuristic architecture beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit hub exit toward city center

events.description: approaching the open archway exit leading to the main city

agents.ego_description: walking toward the plaza exit with the futuristic cityscape visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past the security checkpoint toward the plaza exit. The glass dome structure remains overhead while the view opens up to reveal the futuristic city spires of New Atlantis in the distance. Overhead transit signs for Hotel & Shopping and NAT are prominent as the camera approaches the archway leading to the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined entrance corridor into the expansive, light-filled plaza of a futuristic spaceport. It begins by walking through a narrow channel with orange and white striped walls, moving steadily toward a massive glass dome and the New Atlantis sign. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the space opens into a wide plaza where a cleaning robot traverses the tiled floor and futuristic city spires loom through the geometric ceiling. The view then shifts upward to admire the intricate glass structure before descending to circle a circular UC Security checkpoint booth attended by a guard. Finally, the camera moves past the checkpoint and under overhead transit signs, heading through an archway as the vista expands to reveal the distant spires of the city center.
